title: Incantationem
description: A vanilla+ mod adding diverse enchantments and curses, all integrated into the vanilla ecosystem.
body:
Incantationem is a vanilla+ mod adding enchantments and curses to the game.

***Featuring...*** - Vanilla styled: All enchantments can be obtained by the enchantment table and loot; - 10+ enchantments; -3 curses; - ...and more to come!
For info on each enchantment and curse, check our Wiki.
